name: sheet
title: Sheet
description: Slide-over panel (left/right/top/bottom). Converted from shadcn ui/sheet.tsx (base-ui Dialog, edge-anchored). Six-file compound collapsed into one file (trigger/footer named slots); rung-3 delegated click-listener + data-state driven CSS transition, Escape + overlay-click + close button to dismiss, body-scroll lock while open.
